dag_desc: Fleet loop as first-class citizen — manifest, cross-repo orient, loop lifecycle, loop receipts. Turns donjon's compiler bootstrap loop from convention into protocol.

tasks.desc: Fleet manifest and loop receipt type definitions. FleetManifest (compiler, repos[]), FleetRepoEntry (name, path, request), FleetStatus (per-repo status rollup), LoopReceipt (iteration, compilerCommit, generations[], mining). Zod schemas for validation on load.

loadFleetContext() — reads .roadmap/fleet.json, resolves repo paths, calls loadContext() per repo (read-only). Returns FleetContext with per-repo Context + fleet metadata. Validates repos exist, warns on missing .roadmap/head.json.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: fleet context loading scope is unambiguous — read-only access to external repos, single IO boundary

tasks.desc: Add --fleet flag to roadmap orient. When set, reads fleet manifest, loads fleet context, returns global position: per-repo dagId + status (active/complete/stalled) + current batch + loopReady boolean + blockers array. JSON output, same schema contract as regular orient.

Loop receipt storage at .roadmap/loops/<iteration>.json. writeLoopReceipt() validates and writes. readLoopHistory() scans directory, returns sorted by iteration. SHA-linked chain: each receipt includes previousSha linking to prior iteration.

roadmap loop {start|generate|mine|close} CLI verb. start: records compiler commit + iteration number. generate: records generation commit per repo. mine: structured mining findings (extracted[], requestFixes[], stalled[]). close: writes loop receipt, requires loopReady or --force.

End-to-end: create fleet.json with 2 test repos, orient --fleet shows status, loop start → generate → mine → close writes receipt chain. Verify SHA linking across loop iterations. Verify loopReady gate on close.

validate.statement: Fleet orient returns correct cross-repo status and loop receipts form a valid SHA-linked chain across iterations
